triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME blocks or becomes blocked by a creature, that creature gains wither until end of turn. (It deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)
Whenever CARDNAME blocks or becomes blocked by a creature, that creature gains wither until end of turn. (It deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)
Whenever CARDNAME deals damage to an opponent, remove all -1/-1 counters from it.
